data.content: Shipment review rejected on 2026-03-26T14:39:09Z. Verified the intended change exists on origin/foolery-6c3e, where src/components/beat-columns.tsx no longer inserts the type column, but the tagged shipment commit aea8120e78aa is not contained in origin/main and origin/main still imports/inserts typeColumn(). Acceptance is therefore not live on main. CI is green for current origin/main tip 3f3476530e08, but there is no evidence of a successful deployment of this beat to main. Return to shipment and merge/deploy the beat's commit set before requesting shipment review again.
